title: hieracium bicolor subsp. timbalianum
intro: Hieracium bicolor subsp. timbalianum, also known as the Hieracium species, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions, wounds, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium bicolor subsp. timbalianum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are typically prepared from its leaves and roots.
